title: Link elements from different boards in the dashboard

posts.author: Nicces (Nico)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We work with a board with numerous photovoltaic projects. Each element is a project. We outsource parts of the work for the respective project to another board via mirror columns. For example, the installation of the solar system on the roof.
Deadlines and tasks for the same project are now on different boards.
I would like to be able to display linked elements summarised via a dashboard using mirror columns. For example, the roof installation dates and electrical installation dates for the identical project could be displayed together in the Gantt chart. However, other widgets could also benefit from elements linked via a mirror column.

Greetings, Nico

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nicces ,
I’ve tested your case and see that the mirrored timelines are represented on a gantt chart:

image1585×553 74.9 KB

image1125×304 28.3 KB

Could you please mention here more specifically your problem?

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Nicces Shanine here from Mindflows. While other widgets do not support mirrored columns, you can set-up an automation via Make/Zapier to turn the mirrored column into a native monday.com column and let the automation extract the data to what was mirrored. I’ve done this recently and it worked fine. Hope monday.com will enable mirrored columns to display in all types of widgets. This can turn into a feature request!
